programme.title: Fired on Mars
programme.desc: Invigorated by his new-found community of rebels, Jeff faces a dilemma when Brandon offers him a new opportunity at Mars.ly.

programme.title: Fired on Mars
programme.desc: Invigorated by his new-found community of rebels, Jeff faces a dilemma when Brandon offers him a new opportunity at Mars.ly.

programme.title: Fired on Mars
programme.sub-title: Back In The High Life Again
programme.desc: Jeff finds himself in over his head as he secretly works for Mars.ly anniversary campaign while prepping the Buckies for their imminent departure.

programme.title: Fired on Mars
programme.sub-title: Back In The High Life Again
programme.desc: Jeff finds himself in over his head as he secretly works for Mars.ly anniversary campaign while prepping the Buckies for their imminent departure.

programme.title: Fired on Mars
programme.desc: The Buckies scramble to avoid being caught while Jeff slips further to the dark side of Mars.ly corporate.

programme.title: Fired on Mars
programme.desc: The Buckies scramble to avoid being caught while Jeff slips further to the dark side of Mars.ly corporate.

programme.title: Fired on Mars
programme.desc: As Marsiversary celebrations begin, Trevor continues tracking Hubert, while Crystal searches for a missing Jeff - following a trail that leads to Tee's crew.

programme.title: Fired on Mars
programme.desc: As Marsiversary celebrations begin, Trevor continues tracking Hubert, while Crystal searches for a missing Jeff - following a trail that leads to Tee's crew.

programme.title: Fired on Mars
programme.desc: Millions of miles from his earthbound girlfriend Hannah, graphic designer Jeff finds himself jobless on Mars after his position is unceremoniously eliminated.

programme.title: Fired on Mars
programme.desc: Millions of miles from his earthbound girlfriend Hannah, graphic designer Jeff finds himself jobless on Mars after his position is unceremoniously eliminated.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A seemingly simple scavenging run proves to be very tricky when our group isn't the only one vying for an unexpected supply goldmine.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A seemingly simple scavenging run proves to be very tricky when our group isn't the only one vying for an unexpected supply goldmine.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After Rick comes to the realisation that Alexandria might not be as safe as he thought, decisions must be made about where to go from here.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After Rick comes to the realisation that Alexandria might not be as safe as he thought, decisions must be made about where to go from here.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the group realise the only way to maintain the peace in Alexandria is to fight a new enemy. This time, though, our group might be outmatched.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the group realise the only way to maintain the peace in Alexandria is to fight a new enemy. This time, though, our group might be outmatched.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After experiencing a minor success, there is a whole new set of issues when members of the group are taken and held hostage.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After experiencing a minor success, there is a whole new set of issues when members of the group are taken and held hostage.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Two different groups leave Alexandria on supply runs. While both are concerned with the future of the community, immediate danger will derail them.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Two different groups leave Alexandria on supply runs. While both are concerned with the future of the community, immediate danger will derail them.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Alexandria is alerted after realising someone is missing. Several search parties will venture out, but what they find isn't what they're hoping for.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Alexandria is alerted after realising someone is missing. Several search parties will venture out, but what they find isn't what they're hoping for.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the group must go outside the walls to save one of their own. What they experience on the road will change their lives forever.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the group must go outside the walls to save one of their own. What they experience on the road will change their lives forever.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.sub-title: The Day Will Come When You Won't Be
programme.desc: As the members of the group remain helpless, Negan takes action that will forever haunt those who survive.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.sub-title: The Day Will Come When You Won't Be
programme.desc: As the members of the group remain helpless, Negan takes action that will forever haunt those who survive.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Following a number of familiar faces, we are introduced to a new well-established community that seems too good to be true.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Following a number of familiar faces, we are introduced to a new well-established community that seems too good to be true.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Alexandria gets a sobering visit.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Alexandria gets a sobering visit.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Surrounded by enemies and saddled with grief, members of our group hope to find safety at the Hilltop before it's too late.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Surrounded by enemies and saddled with grief, members of our group hope to find safety at the Hilltop before it's too late.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Someone stumbles upon a brand new society, and this society is unlike anything seen before.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Someone stumbles upon a brand new society, and this society is unlike anything seen before.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A much more detailed look into the world of the Saviors and their home, the Sanctuary. At the same time, members of Alexandria look for supplies.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With members out scavenging for supplies, Negan's unwelcome visit to Alexandria continues. With tensions high, things quickly spin out of control.

programme.title: AFLW: Essendon v Geelong
programme.desc: Will Essendon remain undefeated or can Geelong notch its first win of the 2025 AFLW season when these sides meet at Windy Hill.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: The stakes are high when the forge floor is transformed into the Forged in Fire Casino. Four smiths must leave it all up to chance and allow the Wheel of Forging to determine their challenges.

programme.desc: The stakes are high when the forge floor is transformed into the Forged in Fire Casino. Four smiths must leave it all up to chance and allow the Wheel of Forging to determine their challenges.

programme.title: Ice Vikings
programme.desc: It's an early kick-off to the winter fishing season on Lake Winnipeg as temperatures plunge and the fishing crews scramble to get onto the ice with their nets.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Alex Debogorski races to complete one of Polar's most critical hauls of the season, after a dashboard fire nearly costs him more than just a pay cheque.

programme.desc: Alex Debogorski races to complete one of Polar's most critical hauls of the season, after a dashboard fire nearly costs him more than just a pay cheque.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Tyler and Brettly volunteer to tow in a 1947 railroad speeder. Can the shop hop aboard this rapid restoration express or will a low estimate from Tyler cause the job to jump the tracks?

programme.desc: Tyler and Brettly volunteer to tow in a 1947 railroad speeder. Can the shop hop aboard this rapid restoration express or will a low estimate from Tyler cause the job to jump the tracks?

programme.title: Taskmaster

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor
programme.desc: A blended family in Illinois have their house taken over by ghosts and a woman's childhood home is so infested by spirits that her parents are forced to abandon it.

programme.title: Ice Vikings
programme.desc: Colder temperatures and a dumping of snow marks the kick-off to Bombardier season as the crews take these ice tanks onto the lake.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The landscape in the battle for winter roads supremacy is shaken to the core as Art Burke locks horns with VP Express bosses Hugh Rowland and Vlad Plescott.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: The Mackay House Movers run into damage and deadlines carting two massive sections of house from Brisbane to Condamine. Paul Cunningham attempts to make history moving the largest wind turbines in Australia.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: The Mackay House Movers run into damage and deadlines carting two massive sections of house from Brisbane to Condamine. Paul Cunningham attempts to make history moving the largest wind turbines in Australia.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Grahame takes on the Great Central Road for the first time since The Wet; Robbie Mackay struggles to keep 35 tonnes worth of house rolling; Mick Brett moves a huge tower 511 km from the Port of Newcastle.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Grahame takes on the Great Central Road for the first time since The Wet; Robbie Mackay struggles to keep 35 tonnes worth of house rolling; Mick Brett moves a huge tower 511 km from the Port of Newcastle.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick puts the pedal to the metal when NASCAR driver Greg Biffle asks him to restore his 1970's Montesa motorcycle. Can Rick steer this speed demon dirt bike to the finish line?

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick puts the pedal to the metal when NASCAR driver Greg Biffle asks him to restore his 1970's Montesa motorcycle. Can Rick steer this speed demon dirt bike to the finish line?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Corey plays ball when he gets a signed letter that knocks his White Sox off. Will he swing for the fences, or get shut out? Rick looks at a John Wilkes Booth poster you're not likely to hang in your bedroom.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Corey plays ball when he gets a signed letter that knocks his White Sox off. Will he swing for the fences, or get shut out? Rick looks at a John Wilkes Booth poster you're not likely to hang in your bedroom.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Chum huddles up for a chance to buy an early 20th-century football. Can he get this deal across the goal line? Next, a life-size Spider-Man flies into Rick's web. Will his spidey senses tingle for an offer?

programme.title: Golf: Australian Open Final Round
programme.desc: Championship Sunday at Royal Melbourne GC. Dane Rasmus Neergaard-Peterson holds a two shot lead after 54 holes. Leading Aussie is Cameron Smith, going into the Final Round two shots back from the lead.

programme.desc: Defending champions Patty Tavatanakit and Jake Knapp return to Tiburon Golf Club in Naples as final round coverage gets underway.

programme.title: The River Wild
programme.desc: An expert rafter takes her family for a day out on the river. But when two bank robbers hijack their raft, it turns into a white-water knuckle-biter.

programme.title: The River Wild
programme.desc: An expert rafter takes her family for a day out on the river. But when two bank robbers hijack their raft, it turns into a white-water knuckle-biter.

programme.title: In the Line of Fire
programme.desc: Haunted by his failure to protect JFK in Dallas, a Secret Service agent is taunted by a psychopath stalking the current president.

programme.title: In the Line of Fire
programme.desc: Haunted by his failure to protect JFK in Dallas, a Secret Service agent is taunted by a psychopath stalking the current president.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: With the help of a seismology student, Val and Earl discover their desolate town is infested with huge man-eating creatures living below the ground. The race is on to defeat these slimy subterraneans.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: With the help of a seismology student, Val and Earl discover their desolate town is infested with huge man-eating creatures living below the ground. The race is on to defeat these slimy subterraneans.

programme.title: The Meaning of Life
programme.desc: The Monty Python team tackle this weighty subject in a series of sketches involving body parts, religion, the wonders of war, the miracle of birth, and a preview of what awaits in heaven.

programme.title: The Meaning of Life
programme.desc: The Monty Python team tackle this weighty subject in a series of sketches involving body parts, religion, the wonders of war, the miracle of birth, and a preview of what awaits in heaven.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: When the sons of a cavalry colonel set out to fight a war in Europe, suspicion and jealousy threaten to tear apart their once indestructible bond when the sexy Susanna enters their lives.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: When the sons of a cavalry colonel set out to fight a war in Europe, suspicion and jealousy threaten to tear apart their once indestructible bond when the sexy Susanna enters their lives.

programme.title: The Game
programme.desc: Run by the shadowy Consumer Recreations Services, the Game never quite declares its rules or objectives, but soon Nicholas finds himself in its grasp, and his ordered life starts to fall apart.

programme.title: The Game
programme.desc: Run by the shadowy Consumer Recreations Services, the Game never quite declares its rules or objectives, but soon Nicholas finds himself in its grasp, and his ordered life starts to fall apart.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: A Russian submarine commander attempts to defect to the US, bringing both sides to the brink of war.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: A Russian submarine commander attempts to defect to the US, bringing both sides to the brink of war.

programme.title: Groundhog Day
programme.desc: A self-centred TV weatherman is caught in a personal time warp, forced to relive one strange day over and over again. The jokes explode in this marvellously inventive and offbeat comedy.

programme.title: Groundhog Day
programme.desc: A self-centred TV weatherman is caught in a personal time warp, forced to relive one strange day over and over again. The jokes explode in this marvellously inventive and offbeat comedy.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part II
programme.desc: Daniel, now a karate champ, goes to Okinawa with Mr Miyagi, his mentor. Miyagi rekindles an old flame while Daniel finds love, and enemies, of his own.

programme.title: Saved & Remade
programme.desc: Titch reimagines a motorbike engine, but it throws up an unexpected problem that's a challenge even for him.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: This property is smack bang at the end of the runway of Australia's busiest airport and down the road from the sewerage and desalination plants. Could this possibly be the worst location yet?

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: It's the second week in the pottery and the remaining potters create a statement mantelpiece clock, and face a surprise blindfolded second challenge.

programme.title: Extraordinary Escapes With Sandi Toksvig
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig explores some of the UK's most remote and beautiful holiday destinations, accompanied by some of her favorite women.

programme.title: Extraordinary Escapes With Sandi Toksvig
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig explores some of the UK's most remote and beautiful holiday destinations, accompanied by some of her favorite women.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: New Zealand's Best Homes
programme.desc: Phil gets a taste of the country life right in the middle of the city, before venturing to Queenstown to experience a modern masterpiece.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: New Zealand's Best Homes
programme.desc: Phil gets a taste of the country life right in the middle of the city, before venturing to Queenstown to experience a modern masterpiece.

programme.title: Million Pound...
programme.desc: Jenny Powell and family brave wild swimming in the Lake District. Marie embarks on her new motorhome adventure. Terry prepares for a major RV expo. Paralympian Lisa enjoys van life in California.

programme.title: Million Pound...
programme.desc: Jenny Powell and family brave wild swimming in the Lake District. Marie embarks on her new motorhome adventure. Terry prepares for a major RV expo. Paralympian Lisa enjoys van life in California.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Ian and Ann are challenging the norms of their traditional suburb to build a modern and sustainable home that is clad in water tanks. It's a game of ingenuity for a $1.8 million investment.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Ian and Ann are challenging the norms of their traditional suburb to build a modern and sustainable home that is clad in water tanks. It's a game of ingenuity for a $1.8 million investment.

programme.title: Grand Designs UK
programme.desc: Chef Corinne builds a beautifully crafted, wedge-shaped home designed around her love of cooking. Her plot is a slither of garden down the side her house, with sweeping views but strict conservation area rules.

programme.title: Grand Designs UK
programme.desc: Chef Corinne builds a beautifully crafted, wedge-shaped home designed around her love of cooking. Her plot is a slither of garden down the side her house, with sweeping views but strict conservation area rules.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Trevor and Susan are keen to sell their eccentric gallery home after Susan's cancer diagnosis. The layout is convoluted, which is putting the buyers off. Can the team work their magic to achieve a much needed sale?

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Trevor and Susan are keen to sell their eccentric gallery home after Susan's cancer diagnosis. The layout is convoluted, which is putting the buyers off. Can the team work their magic to achieve a much needed sale?

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Mother and daughter Maria and Marissa have a thriving business operated out of a windmill. They've decided to move on, but this quirky restaurant-cum-residence hasn't exactly been a real estate success story.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Mother and daughter Maria and Marissa have a thriving business operated out of a windmill. They've decided to move on, but this quirky restaurant-cum-residence hasn't exactly been a real estate success story.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan and his team create a stunning family garden for Seema and Nawras, who both work shifts for the NHS while also giving 24-hour care to their severely disabled daughter Nour, and two other children.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan and his team create a stunning family garden for Seema and Nawras, who both work shifts for the NHS while also giving 24-hour care to their severely disabled daughter Nour, and two other children.

programme.title: Country House Rescue
programme.desc: Riverhill House is an 18th-century rag-stone manor set in 130 acres of historic gardens. Evelyn has lived in the grounds for the past 60 years, and has seen the once magnificent treasured estate fall into disrepair.

programme.desc: Riverhill House is an 18th-century rag-stone manor set in 130 acres of historic gardens. Evelyn has lived in the grounds for the past 60 years, and has seen the once magnificent treasured estate fall into disrepair.

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Rachel Burch seeks her Jamaican-born birth father, hoping to connect with her roots. Sue Davis searches for the half-brother her mother had with an American soldier during WWII.

programme.desc: Mick is treated for suspected sepsis, Keith arrives with a dangerously high heart rate and Jillian recovers after a fall as wives reflect on love and hardship.

programme.title: Trouble with the Curve
programme.desc: Gus Lobel has been a top baseball scout for decades, but age has caught up with him. Enter Gus's estranged daughter, an ambitious attorney who joins him for one last recruiting trip.

programme.desc: A financial TV host and his producer are put in an extreme situation when an irate investor who has lost everything forcefully takes over their studio.

programme.desc: The incredible true story that follows an Alaskan State Trooper as he sets out to end the murderous rampage of a serial killer who has gone unnoticed for 13 years.

programme.title: About Schmidt
programme.desc: Academy Award-winner Jack Nicholson stars as Warren Schmidt, an embittered man who has just retired after 32 years as an insurance company actuary and is about to taste a not so sweet slice of life.

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: On a deadly mission behind enemy lines a wily WWII sergeant, his loyal Sherman tank crew and a rookie soldier find themselves hopelessly outnumbered.

programme.title: The Devil's Own
programme.desc: An Irish-American cop in New York befriends an 'innocent' immigrant from Belfast. He turns out to be an IRA rebel on a terrorist mission.

programme.desc: An Irish-American cop in New York befriends an 'innocent' immigrant from Belfast. He turns out to be an IRA rebel on a terrorist mission.

programme.desc: Princess Odette, Prince Derek and their trusted woodland friends reunite in this adventure for their first Christmas celebration together!

programme.desc: Princess Odette, Prince Derek and their trusted woodland friends reunite in this adventure for their first Christmas celebration together!

programme.title: Christmas with the Kranks
programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, the Kranks decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations and to spend the dollars saved on a Caribbean cruise.

programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, the Kranks decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations and to spend the dollars saved on a Caribbean cruise.

programme.title: Murder She Baked: A Plum Pudding Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah is whipping up a special plum pudding for Christmas when she finds a man dead in his own office. The 12 days of Christmas are ticking along, and she's running out of time to find the murderer.

programme.title: Murder She Baked: A Plum Pudding Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah is whipping up a special plum pudding for Christmas when she finds a man dead in his own office. The 12 days of Christmas are ticking along, and she's running out of time to find the murderer.

programme.desc: An American kickboxer in Thailand joins a gang of vampire slayers to rescue his lover from a bloodsucking warlord.

programme.title: After Earth
programme.desc: A crashlanding puts a father and son on a dangerous planet - Earth. Hunted by an alien and by evolved animal species, the pair must work together to survive.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Barely escaping a raging Shanghai nightclub brawl, Indy crash-lands into the wilds of India where he uncovers a sinister scheme that has enslaved a remote village's children in a fortress-like mine.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, Bourne has left his violent past behind and is living a normal life with Marie. His plans for a peaceful life are crushed when he narrowly escapes an assassination attempt.

programme.desc: Madison makes a discovery that could lead her to the answers she seeks.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: The horde led by Troy surrounds the walls of Padre. Madison and her people must fight for their survival to save what remains.

programme.title: China Hackers
programme.desc: For decades, Western leaders wanted to believe that China's economic growth posed no threat to other countries. That hope has been dashed. China is regularly cited as the number one source of cyber attacks.

programme.desc: For decades, Western leaders wanted to believe that China's economic growth posed no threat to other countries. That hope has been dashed. China is regularly cited as the number one source of cyber attacks.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries

programme.title: Falco
programme.desc: Falco must deal with the death of his best friend and prove his innocence, after confirming that his fingerprints were on the weapon that ended his life. A murderer kills in the name of God.

programme.title: Mix Tape
programme.desc: In 1989, Alison's home life goes from bad to worse as she takes on caring for Peter. In 2015, Daniel struggles with Alison's revelations of what occurred during their relationship twenty years ago.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: Marissa Irvine arrives at 14 Arthur Avenue to collect her son Milo from a play date, but the woman who answers insists she's never met him, unleashing every parent's nightmare.

programme.desc: After meeting only in their dreams, a man and a woman have seven days to turn their romantic visions into reality.

programme.title: In My Dreams
programme.desc: After meeting only in their dreams, a man and a woman have seven days to turn their romantic visions into reality.

programme.title: For Love Of The Game
programme.desc: When a legendary pitcher strikes out with his girlfriend, he has to play the game of his life. The suspense lasts until the last ball is thrown in this heartwarming drama.

programme.title: For Love Of The Game
programme.desc: When a legendary pitcher strikes out with his girlfriend, he has to play the game of his life. The suspense lasts until the last ball is thrown in this heartwarming drama.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Annie's life is a mess. But when she finds out her lifelong best friend is engaged, she simply must serve as Lillian's maid of honour.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Annie's life is a mess. But when she finds out her lifelong best friend is engaged, she simply must serve as Lillian's maid of honour.

programme.title: One Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A recently divorced mother attempts to create a perfect Christmas for her children's first time without dad, but a series of comic mishaps threaten her best-laid plans.

programme.title: One Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A recently divorced mother attempts to create a perfect Christmas for her children's first time without dad, but a series of comic mishaps threaten her best-laid plans.

programme.title: Picnic
programme.desc: The son of the richest man in town wants to marry the town's beauty queen, but then she meets an interesting stranger who just got off the train.

programme.title: Picnic
programme.desc: The son of the richest man in town wants to marry the town's beauty queen, but then she meets an interesting stranger who just got off the train.

programme.title: Perfect Romance
programme.desc: In the process of matchmaking for her daughter, a mother meets an unlikely romantic interest.

programme.title: Perfect Romance
programme.desc: In the process of matchmaking for her daughter, a mother meets an unlikely romantic interest.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
programme.desc: It's up to the most rascally sheep in England to bring the flock home when a caravan and a very steep hill lead them all to the big city.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
programme.desc: It's up to the most rascally sheep in England to bring the flock home when a caravan and a very steep hill lead them all to the big city.

programme.title: The Bad Guys
programme.desc: The Bad Guys are the most notorious criminals in the world, pulling off a lifetime of legendary heists, but can the gang of misfits pull off their biggest job yet: going good?

programme.title: The Bad Guys
programme.desc: The Bad Guys are the most notorious criminals in the world, pulling off a lifetime of legendary heists, but can the gang of misfits pull off their biggest job yet: going good?

programme.title: Grand-Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: When Frank Collins (Reno Wilson) suffers from writer's block, he decides to start a day care for his father-in-law (Danny Trejo) and other seniors as a way to make quick cash, while giving him time to still work on his next book. Eventually getting a small group to care for, Frank soon learns that these are not your typical seniors and they can't easily be corralled. With a code enforcement officer challenging the legality of his business, and his senior charges getting into all kinds of trouble, Frank's work days become anything but effortless. Featuring an all-star cast of TV's greatest stars, Grand-Daddy Day Care is a hilarious story for the young, and young at heart.

programme.title: Grand-Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: When Frank Collins (Reno Wilson) suffers from writer's block, he decides to start a day care for his father-in-law (Danny Trejo) and other seniors as a way to make quick cash, while giving him time to still work on his next book. Eventually getting a small group to care for, Frank soon learns that these are not your typical seniors and they can't easily be corralled. With a code enforcement officer challenging the legality of his business, and his senior charges getting into all kinds of trouble, Frank's work days become anything but effortless. Featuring an all-star cast of TV's greatest stars, Grand-Daddy Day Care is a hilarious story for the young, and young at heart.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Recruited from youngsters into the global spy game, four penguins are called into action by a mysterious espionage organisation in order to save the world from a villainous octopus.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Recruited from youngsters into the global spy game, four penguins are called into action by a mysterious espionage organisation in order to save the world from a villainous octopus.

programme.title: The Road to El Dorado
programme.desc: Get ready for an exhilarating ride of a lifetime! Join Tulio and Miguel and their hilarious horse Altivo as they set sail, map in hand, in search of golden treasure.

programme.title: The Road to El Dorado
programme.desc: Get ready for an exhilarating ride of a lifetime! Join Tulio and Miguel and their hilarious horse Altivo as they set sail, map in hand, in search of golden treasure.

programme.title: The Pirates Who Don't Do Anything
programme.desc: Those vege-eating boys are back! This time they're cabin boys in a pirate theatre and are called upon to put aside their lazy, cowardly ways and help a princess rescue her brother who's been kidnapped.

programme.title: The Pirates Who Don't Do Anything
programme.desc: Those vege-eating boys are back! This time they're cabin boys in a pirate theatre and are called upon to put aside their lazy, cowardly ways and help a princess rescue her brother who's been kidnapped.

programme.title: The Croods: A New Age
programme.desc: In search of a new home, the Croods encounter the more sophisticated Betterman family. A new threat forces the two families to set aside their differences to avoid extinction.

programme.title: The Croods: A New Age
programme.desc: In search of a new home, the Croods encounter the more sophisticated Betterman family. A new threat forces the two families to set aside their differences to avoid extinction.

programme.title: An American Tail
programme.desc: Fievel the mouse travels from Russia to America with his family in the late 1800s to seek freedom from cat persecution.

programme.title: An American Tail
programme.desc: Fievel the mouse travels from Russia to America with his family in the late 1800s to seek freedom from cat persecution.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: The gang is back but the game has changed. They discover that nothing is as they expect, as they try to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: The gang is back but the game has changed. They discover that nothing is as they expect, as they try to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Eddie Murphy and Jeff Garlin put their parenting skills to the test in this hilarious caper about two sacked admen and newly stay-at-home dads who open their own day-care centre.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Eddie Murphy and Jeff Garlin put their parenting skills to the test in this hilarious caper about two sacked admen and newly stay-at-home dads who open their own day-care centre.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: A bee is abuzz over a scandal: people are stealing honey to eat. With the help of a florist, he sues the human race for 'honey laundering'.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: A bee is abuzz over a scandal: people are stealing honey to eat. With the help of a florist, he sues the human race for 'honey laundering'.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: After he is fired from the Anti-Villain League for failing to take down the latest bad guy to threaten humanity, Gru finds himself in the middle of a major identity crisis. When a mysterious stranger shows up to inform Gru that he has a long-lost twin brother who desperately wishes to follow in his twin's despicable footsteps, one former supervillain will rediscover just how good it feels to be bad.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: After he is fired from the Anti-Villain League for failing to take down the latest bad guy to threaten humanity, Gru finds himself in the middle of a major identity crisis. When a mysterious stranger shows up to inform Gru that he has a long-lost twin brother who desperately wishes to follow in his twin's despicable footsteps, one former supervillain will rediscover just how good it feels to be bad.

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: Curse Of Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: Wallace and Gromit's latest enterprise is Anti-Pesto, pest control with a heart. When called upon by the dotty Lady Tottington to solve her rabbit infestation, Wallace tangles with her Ladyship's would-be suitor, rotten cad Victor Quartermaine. At first Wallace and Gromit seem to have things in hand. But Wallace's mind transference device malfunctions, and he's in danger of being bagged by Quartermaine. Wallace teeters perilously close to disaster and his four-legged pal, Gromit, faces almost insurmountable odds to save the day!

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: Curse Of Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: Wallace and Gromit's latest enterprise is Anti-Pesto, pest control with a heart. When called upon by the dotty Lady Tottington to solve her rabbit infestation, Wallace tangles with her Ladyship's would-be suitor, rotten cad Victor Quartermaine. At first Wallace and Gromit seem to have things in hand. But Wallace's mind transference device malfunctions, and he's in danger of being bagged by Quartermaine. Wallace teeters perilously close to disaster and his four-legged pal, Gromit, faces almost insurmountable odds to save the day!

programme.title: Shark Tale
programme.desc: Oscar is a fast-talking little fish whose big dreams have a habit of landing him in hot water. Lenny is a great white shark with a sensitive side and a secret: he's a vegetarian.

programme.title: Shark Tale
programme.desc: Oscar is a fast-talking little fish whose big dreams have a habit of landing him in hot water. Lenny is a great white shark with a sensitive side and a secret: he's a vegetarian.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Welcome to the Hotel Transylvania. Dracula, who runs a five-stake resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the count's daughter.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Welcome to the Hotel Transylvania. Dracula, who runs a five-stake resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the count's daughter.

programme.title: Mack & Rita
programme.desc: Wakes up after being struck by lightning in a sound bath regression pod to find she has magically transformed into her 70-year-old self.

programme.title: Mack & Rita
programme.desc: Wakes up after being struck by lightning in a sound bath regression pod to find she has magically transformed into her 70-year-old self.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
Black Bag
programme.desc: When his beloved wife, Kathryn, is suspected of betraying the nation, intelligence agent George Woodhouse faces the ultimate test - loyalty to his marriage or his country.

programme.title: Black Bag
programme.desc: When his beloved wife, Kathryn, is suspected of betraying the nation, intelligence agent George Woodhouse faces the ultimate test - loyalty to his marriage or his country.

programme.title: Last Vegas
programme.desc: When the group's sworn bachelor finally proposes to his thirty-something girlfriend, four friends head to Las Vegas with a plan to stop acting their age and relive their glory days.

programme.title: Last Vegas
programme.desc: When the group's sworn bachelor finally proposes to his thirty-something girlfriend, four friends head to Las Vegas with a plan to stop acting their age and relive their glory days.

programme.title: Christmas with the Kranks
programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, the Kranks decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations and to spend the dollars saved on a Caribbean cruise.

programme.title: Christmas with the Kranks
programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, the Kranks decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations and to spend the dollars saved on a Caribbean cruise.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: A mild-mannered accountant whose glory days are behind him, bumps into a formerly nerdy classmate and is pulled into the high-stakes world of international espionage.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: A mild-mannered accountant whose glory days are behind him, bumps into a formerly nerdy classmate and is pulled into the high-stakes world of international espionage.

programme.title: The Benchwarmers
programme.desc: Three older guys get to fulfil their childhood sporting dreams becoming heroes to the bullied, clumsy and athletically-challenged everywhere.

programme.title: The Benchwarmers
programme.desc: Three older guys get to fulfil their childhood sporting dreams becoming heroes to the bullied, clumsy and athletically-challenged everywhere.

programme.title: The War With Grandpa
programme.desc: When grandfather Ed moves in, Peter is forced to give up his bedroom. Unwilling to tolerate this injustice, Peter devises a series of pranks to drive him out.

programme.title: The War With Grandpa
programme.desc: When grandfather Ed moves in, Peter is forced to give up his bedroom. Unwilling to tolerate this injustice, Peter devises a series of pranks to drive him out.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: Five high school pals reunite after 30 years at a July Fourth celebration and wrestle with the challenges of adulthood. No one wants to be the grown-up of the gang.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: Five high school pals reunite after 30 years at a July Fourth celebration and wrestle with the challenges of adulthood. No one wants to be the grown-up of the gang.

programme.title: Bad Neighbours 2
programme.desc: Mac and Kelly decide to sell and move to the suburbs. But when a sorority moves in and threatens the sale, they must team up with their former enemy Teddy, to bring the girls down.

programme.title: Bad Neighbours 2
programme.desc: Mac and Kelly decide to sell and move to the suburbs. But when a sorority moves in and threatens the sale, they must team up with their former enemy Teddy, to bring the girls down.

programme.title: Joe Dirt
programme.desc: Left by his parents as a child, Joe Dirt had to raise himself. When he goes on a radio show and tells his story, it grabs the attention of the audience who try to help him find his family.

programme.title: Joe Dirt
programme.desc: Left by his parents as a child, Joe Dirt had to raise himself. When he goes on a radio show and tells his story, it grabs the attention of the audience who try to help him find his family.
